intro: Aloe vera tincture is a concentrated liquid extract made from the gel of the aloe vera plant, rich in vitamins, minerals, and anti-inflammatory compounds. This tincture has been traditionally used to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues, and is also believed to have antioxidant properties. When taken internally, aloe vera tincture can help to promote overall health and well-being, while also providing relief from symptoms of constipation and other gastrointestinal issues.
